name: Holy Avenger
description: You gain a +3 bonus to attack rolls and damage rolls made with this magic weapon. When you hit a Fiend or an Undead with it, that creature takes an extra 2d10 Radiant damage.

aura.description: While you hold the drawn weapon, it creates 10-foot Emanation originating from you

benefits.friendly_creatures: You and all creatures Friendly to you in Emanation have Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects

aura.paladin_scaling: If you have 17+ levels in Paladin class, Emanation size increases to 30 feet
